revision.text:
'''癸丑'''（みずのとうし、きちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて50番目で、前は[[壬子]]、次は[[甲寅]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==癸丑の年==
==癸丑の日== ===[[選日]]=== 癸丑の日は[[八専]]の間日である。

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[ja:癸丑]]

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).

== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''癸丑'''（みずのとうし、きすいのうし、きちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの50番目で、前は[[壬子]]、次は[[甲寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==癸丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って53が余る年が癸丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[53年]] *[[113年]] *[[173年]] *[[233年]] *[[293年]] *[[353年]] *[[413年]] *[[473年]] *[[533年]] *[[593年]] *[[653年]] *[[713年]] *[[773年]] *[[833年]] *[[893年]] *[[953年]] | *[[1013年]] *[[1073年]] *[[1133年]] *[[1193年]] *[[1253年]] *[[1313年]] *[[1373年]] *[[1433年]] *[[1493年]] *[[1553年]] *[[1613年]] *[[1673年]] *[[1733年]] *[[1793年]] *[[1853年]] *[[1913年]] *[[1973年]] | *[[2033年]] *[[2093年]] *[[2153年]] *[[2213年]] *[[2273年]] *[[2333年]] *[[2393年]] *[[2453年]] *[[2513年]] *[[2573年]] *[[2633年]] *[[2693年]] *[[2753年]] *[[2813年]] *[[2873年]] *[[2933年]] *[[2993年]] |}
==癸丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[12月]]が癸丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸丑の日== ===選日=== 癸丑の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:癸丑]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:癸丑]]

== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''癸丑'''（みずのとうし、きすいのうし、きちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの50番目で、前は[[壬子]]、次は[[甲寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==癸丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って53が余る年が癸丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[53年]] *[[113年]] *[[173年]] *[[233年]] *[[293年]] *[[353年]] *[[413年]] *[[473年]] *[[533年]] *[[593年]] *[[653年]] *[[713年]] *[[773年]] *[[833年]] *[[893年]] *[[953年]] | *[[1013年]] *[[1073年]] *[[1133年]] *[[1193年]] *[[1253年]] *[[1313年]] *[[1373年]] *[[1433年]] *[[1493年]] *[[1553年]] *[[1613年]] *[[1673年]] *[[1733年]] *[[1793年]] *[[1853年]] *[[1913年]] *[[1973年]] | *[[2033年]] *[[2093年]] *[[2153年]] *[[2213年]] *[[2273年]] *[[2333年]] *[[2393年]] *[[2453年]] *[[2513年]] *[[2573年]] *[[2633年]] *[[2693年]] *[[2753年]] *[[2813年]] *[[2873年]] *[[2933年]] *[[2993年]] |}
==癸丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[12月]]が癸丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸丑の日== ===選日=== 癸丑の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:癸丑]]

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''癸丑'''（みずのとうし、きすいのうし、きちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの50番目で、前は[[壬子]]、次は[[甲寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==癸丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って53が余る年が癸丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[53年]] *[[113年]] *[[173年]] *[[233年]] *[[293年]] *[[353年]] *[[413年]] *[[473年]] *[[533年]] *[[593年]] *[[653年]] *[[713年]] *[[773年]] *[[833年]] *[[893年]] *[[953年]] | *[[1013年]] *[[1073年]] *[[1133年]] *[[1193年]] *[[1253年]] *[[1313年]] *[[1373年]] *[[1433年]] *[[1493年]] *[[1553年]] *[[1613年]] *[[1673年]] *[[1733年]] *[[1793年]] *[[1853年]] *[[1913年]] *[[1973年]] | *[[2033年]] *[[2093年]] *[[2153年]] *[[2213年]] *[[2273年]] *[[2333年]] *[[2393年]] *[[2453年]] *[[2513年]] *[[2573年]] *[[2633年]] *[[2693年]] *[[2753年]] *[[2813年]] *[[2873年]] *[[2933年]] *[[2993年]] |}
==癸丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[12月]]が癸丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸丑の日== ===選日=== 癸丑の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:unsorted completion categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:癸丑]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! == Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

==癸丑の日== ===選日=== 癸丑の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:癸丑]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{干支}} '''癸丑'''（みずのとうし、きすいのうし、きちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの50番目で、前は[[壬子]]、次は[[甲寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。

==癸丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[12月]]が癸丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸丑の日== ===選日=== 癸丑の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:癸丑]]

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! == Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

{{干支}} '''癸丑'''（みずのとうし、きすいのうし、きちゅう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの50番目で、前は[[壬子]]、次は[[甲寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==癸丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って53が余る年が癸丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[53年]] *[[113年]] *[[173年]] *[[233年]] *[[293年]] *[[353年]] *[[413年]] *[[473年]] *[[533年]] *[[593年]] *[[653年]] *[[713年]] *[[773年]] *[[833年]] *[[893年]] *[[953年]] | *[[1013年]] *[[1073年]] *[[1133年]] *[[1193年]] *[[1253年]] *[[1313年]] *[[1373年]] *[[1433年]] *[[1493年]] *[[1553年]] *[[1613年]] *[[1673年]] *[[1733年]] *[[1793年]] *[[1853年]] *[[1913年]] *[[1973年]] | *[[2033年]] *[[2093年]] *[[2153年]] *[[2213年]] *[[2273年]] *[[2333年]] *[[2393年]] *[[2453年]] *[[2513年]] *[[2573年]] *[[2633年]] *[[2693年]] *[[2753年]] *[[2813年]] *[[2873年]] *[[2933年]] *[[2993年]] |}
==癸丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[12月]]が癸丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸丑の日== ===選日=== 癸丑の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:癸丑]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''癸丑'''（みずのとうし、きすいのうし、きちゅう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの50番目で、前は[[壬子]]、次は[[甲寅]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[丑]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==癸丑の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って53が余る年が癸丑の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸丑の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[53年]] *[[113年]] *[[173年]] *[[233年]] *[[293年]] *[[353年]] *[[413年]] *[[473年]] *[[533年]] *[[593年]] *[[653年]] *[[713年]] *[[773年]] *[[833年]] *[[893年]] *[[953年]] | *[[1013年]] *[[1073年]] *[[1133年]] *[[1193年]] *[[1253年]] *[[1313年]] *[[1373年]] *[[1433年]] *[[1493年]] *[[1553年]] *[[1613年]] *[[1673年]] *[[1733年]] *[[1793年]] *[[1853年]] *[[1913年]] *[[1973年]] | *[[2033年]] *[[2093年]] *[[2153年]] *[[2213年]] *[[2273年]] *[[2333年]] *[[2393年]] *[[2453年]] *[[2513年]] *[[2573年]] *[[2633年]] *[[2693年]] *[[2753年]] *[[2813年]] *[[2873年]] *[[2933年]] *[[2993年]] |}
==癸丑の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[12月]]が癸丑の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小寒]]から[[立春]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸丑の日== ===選日=== 癸丑の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとうし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸丑]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:癸丑]]

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:Water Ox]][[ja:Water Ox]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Water Ox]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Water Ox]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Water Ox]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Water Ox-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Water Ox}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Water Ox]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[en:Water Ox]][[ja:癸丑]]

{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=Yin Water Ox}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.comment: adding interwikis to the sexagenary cycle
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "-qq]]" to "—>[[category:qq close]]"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! == Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|陰陽五行思想}}" to "|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! == Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period.== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.

However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春|12=draft|12=draft}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|壬子|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|甲寅|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}}癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}}丑 represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=draft|12=draft}} (Earth conquers Water).
== Years of Kinoe-Ushi == Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[53]] * [[113]] * [[173]] * [[233]] * [[293]] * [[353]] * [[413]] * [[473]] * [[533]] * [[593]] * [[653]] * [[713]] * [[773]] * [[833]] * [[893]] * [[953]] | * [[1013]] * [[1073]] * [[1133]] * [[1193]] * [[1253]] * [[1313]] * [[1373]] * [[1433]] * [[1493]] * [[1553]] * [[1613]] * [[1673]] * [[1733]] * [[1793]] * [[1853]] * [[1913]] * [[1973]] | * [[2033]] * [[2093]] * [[2153]] * [[2213]] * [[2273]] * [[2333]] * [[2393]] * [[2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[2933]] * [[2993]] |}
== Months of Kinoe-Ushi == The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|二十四節気|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Shōkan|ja|小寒|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春|12=draft|12=draft}}) in traditional contexts.
== Days of Kinoe-Ushi == === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
<!--Water Ox--> <!--Water Ox--> <!--Water Ox-->

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]] [[zh-yue:丁巳]]
