revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh min nan"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh min nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh_yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}

However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

revision.comment: Appending wikidata link for Q267521
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

revision.comment: Consolidate multiple wikidata link templates into single one at end
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]] [[zh-yue:丁巳]]

However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh_yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh_yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.

==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh_yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh_yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]] [[zh-yue:丁巳]]

[[ko:정사 (간지)]] [[vi:Đinh Tỵ]] [[za:Dingceij]] [[zh:丁巳]] [[ar:Yin Water Ox]]

[[3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:53|53]] * [[:en:113|113]] * [[:en:173|173]] * [[:en:233|233]] * [[:en:293|293]] * [[:en:353|353]] * [[:en:413|413]] * [[:en:473|473]] * [[:en:533|533]] * [[:en:593|593]] * [[:en:653|653]] * [[:en:713|713]] * [[:en:773|773]] * [[:en:833|833]] * [[:en:893|893]] * [[:en:953|953]] | * [[:en:1013|1013]] * [[:en:1073|1073]] * [[:en:1133|1133]] * [[:en:1193|1193]] * [[:en:1253|1253]] * [[:en:1313|1313]] * [[:en:1373|1373]] * [[:en:1433|1433]] * [[:en:1493|1493]] * [[:en:1553|1553]] * [[:en:1613|1613]] * [[:en:1673|1673]] * [[:en:1733|1733]] * [[:en:1793|1793]] * [[:en:1853|1853]] * [[:en:1913|1913]] * [[:en:1973|1973]] | * [[:en:2033|2033]] * [[:en:2093|2093]] * [[:en:2153|2153]] * [[:en:2213|2213]] * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] [[:en:Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! ==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar terms]] (from [[:en:Xiaohan|Shōkan]] to the day before [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]]) in traditional contexts.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q267521]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Ox [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Ox (zodiac)|en|Ox (zodiac)|WD=Q599644|lt=Ox (丑)}} represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * {{ill|53|en|53|WD=Q4640335|lt=53}} * {{ill|113|en|113|WD=Q416664|lt=113}} * {{ill|173|en|173|WD=Q30344|lt=173}} * {{ill|233|en|233|WD=Q31237|lt=233}} * {{ill|293|en|293|WD=Q33318|lt=293}} * {{ill|353|en|353|WD=Q32275|lt=353}} * {{ill|413|en|413|WD=Q31510|lt=413}} * {{ill|473|en|473|WD=Q31611|lt=473}} * {{ill|533|en|533|WD=Q30482|lt=533}} * {{ill|593|en|593|WD=Q33889|lt=593}} * {{ill|653|en|653|WD=Q30094|lt=653}} * {{ill|713|en|713|WD=Q23523|lt=713}} * {{ill|773|en|773|WD=Q31131|lt=773}} * {{ill|833|en|833|WD=Q30377|lt=833}} * {{ill|893|en|893|WD=Q24762|lt=893}} * {{ill|953|en|953|WD=Q23586|lt=953}} | * {{ill|1013|en|1013|WD=Q19241|lt=1013}} * {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073}} * {{ill|1133|en|1133|WD=Q19586|lt=1133}} * {{ill|1193|en|1193|WD=Q19741|lt=1193}} * {{ill|1253|en|1253|WD=Q5498|lt=1253}} * {{ill|1313|en|1313|WD=Q5735|lt=1313}} * {{ill|1373|en|1373|WD=Q6261|lt=1373}} * {{ill|1433|en|1433|WD=Q6356|lt=1433}} * {{ill|1493|en|1493|WD=Q6687|lt=1493}} * {{ill|1553|en|1553|WD=Q6568|lt=1553}} * {{ill|1613|en|1613|WD=Q6776|lt=1613}} * {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673}} * {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733}} * {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793}} * {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} * {{ill|1913|en|1913|WD=Q2080|lt=1913}} * {{ill|1973|en|1973|WD=Q2477|lt=1973}} | * {{ill|2033|en|2033|WD=Q12786|lt=2033}} * {{ill|2093|en|2093|WD=Q972053|lt=2093}} * [[:en:2153|2153]] * {{ill|2213|en|2213|WD=Q47413739|lt=2213}} * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar terms}} (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Shōkan}} to the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}}) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Ox (zodiac)|en|Ox (zodiac)|WD=Q599644|lt=Ox (丑)}} represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu

--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! ==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar terms}} (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Shōkan}} to the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}}) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Ox also known as Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Ox (zodiac)|en|Ox (zodiac)|WD=Q599644|lt=Ox (丑)}} represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi ***Onyomi 1: kichi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
<!-- == * Yin Water Ox (癸丑) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi) ***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi) ***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Ox== Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi''' |- ! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]] |- | * {{ill|53|en|53|WD=Q4640335|lt=53}} * {{ill|113|en|113|WD=Q416664|lt=113}} * {{ill|173|en|173|WD=Q30344|lt=173}} * {{ill|233|en|233|WD=Q31237|lt=233}} * {{ill|293|en|293|WD=Q33318|lt=293}} * {{ill|353|en|353|WD=Q32275|lt=353}} * {{ill|413|en|413|WD=Q31510|lt=413}} * {{ill|473|en|473|WD=Q31611|lt=473}} * {{ill|533|en|533|WD=Q30482|lt=533}} * {{ill|593|en|593|WD=Q33889|lt=593}} * {{ill|653|en|653|WD=Q30094|lt=653}} * {{ill|713|en|713|WD=Q23523|lt=713}} * {{ill|773|en|773|WD=Q31131|lt=773}} * {{ill|833|en|833|WD=Q30377|lt=833}} * {{ill|893|en|893|WD=Q24762|lt=893}} * {{ill|953|en|953|WD=Q23586|lt=953}} | * {{ill|1013|en|1013|WD=Q19241|lt=1013}} * {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073}} * {{ill|1133|en|1133|WD=Q19586|lt=1133}} * {{ill|1193|en|1193|WD=Q19741|lt=1193}} * {{ill|1253|en|1253|WD=Q5498|lt=1253}} * {{ill|1313|en|1313|WD=Q5735|lt=1313}} * {{ill|1373|en|1373|WD=Q6261|lt=1373}} * {{ill|1433|en|1433|WD=Q6356|lt=1433}} * {{ill|1493|en|1493|WD=Q6687|lt=1493}} * {{ill|1553|en|1553|WD=Q6568|lt=1553}} * {{ill|1613|en|1613|WD=Q6776|lt=1613}} * {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673}} * {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733}} * {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793}} * {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} * {{ill|1913|en|1913|WD=Q2080|lt=1913}} * {{ill|1973|en|1973|WD=Q2477|lt=1973}} | * {{ill|2033|en|2033|WD=Q12786|lt=2033}} * {{ill|2093|en|2093|WD=Q972053|lt=2093}} * [[:en:2153|2153]] * {{ill|2213|en|2213|WD=Q47413739|lt=2213}} * [[:en:2273|2273]] * [[:en:2333|2333]] * [[:en:2393|2393]] * [[:en:2453|2453]] * [[2513]] * [[2573]] * [[:en:2633|2633]] * [[2693]] * [[2753]] * [[2813]] * [[2873]] * [[:en:2933|2933]] * [[:en:2993|2993]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Ox== The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar terms}} (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Shōkan}} to the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}}) in traditional contexts.
==Days of Yin Water Ox== === Auspicious Dates === Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Ox (zodiac)|en|Ox (zodiac)|WD=Q599644|lt=Ox (丑)}} represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).
